title: BEM-880 integration validation
objective:
Run script:
"""
Path('governance/reports').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
required = [
 'governance/runtime/bem880/accepted_roadmap_v17.json',
 'governance/state/architecture_registry.json',
 'governance/state/objects_registry.json',
 'governance/state/task_registry.json',
 'governance/state/rule_registry.json',
 'governance/state/channel_registry.json',
 'governance/logs/event_log.jsonl',
 'governance/state/workspace_registry.json',
 'governance/state/product_repository_registry.json',
 'governance/state/testing_policy.json',
 'governance/architecture/BEM880_MANAGING_CONTOUR_ARCHITECTURE.md',
 'governance/rules/BEM880_RULE_REGISTRY.md',
 'governance/channels/BEM880_MANAGED_COMMON_CHANNEL.md',
 'governance/product_repositories/BEM880_PRODUCT_REPOSITORY_MODEL.md',
 'governance/testing/BEM880_ASSIGNED_TESTING_POLICY.md'
]
missing = [p for p in required if not Path(p).exists()]
tr = Path('governance/state/task_registry.json')
all_tasks_done = False
pending = []
if tr.exists():
    data = json.loads(tr.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
    pending = [t.get('id','') for t in data.get('tasks', []) if t.get('status') != 'completed']
    all_tasks_done = len(pending) == 0
    data['status'] = 'completed' if all_tasks_done and not missing else 'incomplete'
    data['integration_validation'] = {'missing': missing, 'pending': pending}
    tr.write_text(json.dumps(data, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')
status = 'COMPLETED' if (not missing and all_tasks_done) else 'INCOMPLETE'
report = '# BEM-880 Roadmap execution report\n\n'
report += 'Status: ' + status + '\n\n'
report += 'Accepted roadmap: BEM-879 protocol v1.7.\n\n'
report += 'Worker model: Curator + 3 internal contours.\n\n'
report += 'Completed contours:\n- WRK-C1: registries and architecture.\n- WRK-C2: rule registry, managed channel, event log.\n- WRK-C3: workspaces, product repository model, assigned testing policy.\n\n'
report += 'Required artifacts checked: ' + str(len(required)) + '\n\n'
report += 'Missing artifacts: ' + (', '.join(missing) if missing else 'none') + '\n\n'
report += 'Pending tasks: ' + (', '.join(pending) if pending else 'none') + '\n\n'
report += 'Result: roadmap execution is ' + status + '.\n'
Path('governance/reports/BEM880_ROADMAP_EXECUTION_REPORT.md').write_text(report, encoding='utf-8')
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM880_EXECUTION_VALIDATION_' + status + '.md')
marker.write_text('# BEM-880 execution validation\nStatus: ' + status + '\nMissing: ' + (', '.join(missing) if missing else 'none') + '\nPending: ' + (', '.join(pending) if pending else 'none') + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
curator = '# BEM-880 ROADMAP EXECUTION RESPONSE\nStatus: ' + status + '\n\nFindings:\n- Accepted roadmap v1.7 was executed through Worker with 3 internal contours.\n- WRK-C1, WRK-C2 and WRK-C3 produced required artifacts.\n- Integration validation checked required artifacts and task registry.\n\nEvidence:\n- governance/reports/BEM880_ROADMAP_EXECUTION_REPORT.md\n- ' + str(marker) + '\n- governance/state/task_registry.json\n\nRecommendation:\n- Treat BEM-880 as completed if Status is COMPLETED.\n'
Path('governance/audit/mailbox/from_curator/BEM880_ROADMAP_EXECUTION_RESPONSE.md').write_text(curator, encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/task_registry.json','governance/reports/BEM880_ROADMAP_EXECUTION_REPORT.md',str(marker),'governance/audit/mailbox/from_curator/BEM880_ROADMAP_EXECUTION_RESPONSE.md'])
ops_applied.append('BEM880 integration validation status ' + status)
"""
No issue comments.
